rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings
Assumptions and guarantees for component ports belong in component type scopes
generic_rules: Preserve AADL component structure and scope rules during AGREE annex insertion
Use only visible identifiers from the input AADL model in AGREE contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Implementation-level bindings require placement in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
Do not reference AADL property names as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports
irrelevant_topics: AGREE contract generation and clause assignment
